summary: Both sections are present and in order with EDS hero-banner signature classes, but the CTA button is missing from the rendered output entirely, which is a critical content omission. The arrow icon position is also off and several text lines were invented beyond the design spec digest.

issues.expected: Visible 'Get to know YEZTUGO' CTA pill button with arrow icon at lower-left of photo (design strip 5)
issues.actual: CTA button is not visible in the rendered output (strip 5 shows only the actor portrayals line, no button)
issues.fix: Ensure the CTA wrapper is rendered and positioned within the banner; verify it is not clipped by overflow:hidden or pushed out of the visible region

issues.expected: Design digest lists title text 'The first-ever / twice-yearly PrEP is here / One office visit, every six m...' — the second strip cuts off
issues.actual: Code adds full lines 'One office visit, every six months. 2 times a year for HIV prevention.' and 'Two injections per visit, after starter dosing.' which match the visual but bt2-line4 may be invented vs. digest
issues.fix: Verify line 4 'Two injections per visit, after starter dosing.' matches design exactly (it appears in strip 4, so likely OK — confirm wording)
Shift arrow to x≈288px; the absolute left:183px offset inside button does not achieve the target position

issues.expected: Title 'Dosing information for treatment with TRODELVY' fully visible within banner (design strip 1-2)
issues.actual: In render strip 1 the second line 'treatment with TRODELVY' is partially clipped at the bottom edge
issues.fix: Adjust hero-banner-content top position or banner height so both title lines are visible

issues.expected: Use design tokens for font sizes where available (e.g. h-scale tokens)
issues.actual: Many raw px font sizes used (25px, 27.9px, 46.49px, 15.5px, 11.62px) instead of tokens
issues.fix: Map title/body sizes to nearest --h*/--*-body tokens where a token exists

issues.expected: 'PrEP is here' rendered in white over photo per design strip 4
issues.actual: Matches visually but relies on hardcoded white; acceptable

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈288px (check column/alignment classes)
